welcomeDescription: Your personal AI assistant for smarter education.
askAstro_description: Ask any question and get expert academic explanations.
askAstro_cardDescription: I can explain complex topics, solve problems, or help with homework.
askAstro_answer_description: Here is what I found for you:
askAstro_dashboard_desc: Get instant answers to your academic questions.
attendance_desc: Manage and track student attendance easily.
calendar_desc: Keep track of important dates and schedules.
contentAdaptation_desc: Adapt your content for different grade levels.
lessonPlanner_desc: Create comprehensive lesson plans in seconds.
presentationCreator_desc: Generate slide content for your classes.
qrCodeGenerator_desc: Create QR codes for quick resource access.
quizGenerator_desc: Generate quizzes from any topic or text.
smartClass_description: Enhance your classroom with digital libraries, AI-powered video searches, and a repository of class recordings.
teacherPD_description: Create a personalized professional development plan to enhance your teaching skills and reach your career goals.
pd_cardDescription: Tell us what you want to learn or improve in your teaching career.
pd_goal_label: What is your professional learning goal?
pd_goal_placeholder: e.g., I want to improve classroom management for Grade 5 students.
pd_error_noGoal_desc: Please enter a learning goal to generate a plan.
pd_error_generic: Failed to generate plan. Please try again.
pd_generating_desc: Our AI is crafting a personalized roadmap for your professional development.
textbooks_description: Access and manage digital textbook content.
visualAidsGenerator_desc: Create diagrams and visual aids for teaching.
writingAssistant_desc: Help students improve their writing skills.
pageDescription_attendance: Track and manage student attendance using AI face recognition.
cameraView_description: Use the camera to recognize students present in the classroom.
attendanceList_description: The list of students recognized in the current session.
noStudentsRecognized_text: No students recognized. Please try again.
attendanceResultsPlaceholder: Take a photo to see attendance results.
cameraAccessRequired_description: Please grant camera access to use the attendance feature.
cameraAccessDenied_description: Could not access the camera. Please check your browser settings.
errorRecognizingStudents_description: There was a problem recognizing students. Please try again.
pageDescription_photoToWorksheet: Convert textbook pages or handwritten notes into interactive digital worksheets.
uploadPhoto_description: Upload a clear photo of the material you want to convert.
generatedWorksheet_description: Review and interact with your generated questions.
worksheetPlaceholder: Upload a photo and click generate to see your worksheet.
